system_description: An AI-native workbench that turns one-sentence product ideas or existing codebases into enterprise-grade engineering specs and CLI commands, with every tech-stack recommendation traced to system performance metrics (availability, throughput, latency), running alongside existing customer systems with a live feedback loop that recommends design improvements and proactively surfaces additional features.

functions.name: authenticate_session
functions.description_hint: Verify actor session before any protected action via configured IdP.

functions.name: persist_idea_prompt
functions.description_hint: Persist submitted idea prompt to project context with a stable Project ID.

functions.name: initiate_intake_session
functions.description_hint: Initiate conversational intake scoped to a Project ID.

functions.name: present_intake_question
functions.description_hint: Present intake question within FOUNDER_INTAKE_RESPONSE_BUDGET_MS.

functions.name: classify_idea_domain
functions.description_hint: Classify the idea's domain via configured LLM Provider.

functions.name: loop_intake_to_threshold
functions.description_hint: Loop intake until INTAKE_COMPLETENESS_THRESHOLD is met.

functions.name: assemble_scope_outline
functions.description_hint: Assemble initial scope outline from intake transcript.

functions.name: draft_tech_stack_recommendation
functions.description_hint: Draft tech-stack recommendation per identified subsystem.

functions.name: invoke_metric_traceback
functions.description_hint: Invoke UC08 traceback for every tech-stack recommendation.

functions.name: assemble_spec_bundle
functions.description_hint: Assemble spec bundle (scope + traced recs + constants).

functions.name: validate_spec_schema
functions.description_hint: Validate spec against spec-shape schema; fail-closed on reject.

functions.name: enforce_spec_generation_timeout
functions.description_hint: Complete spec generation within SPEC_GENERATION_TIMEOUT_SEC.

functions.name: persist_spec_versioned
functions.description_hint: Persist spec to VCS with draft status + commit hash.

functions.name: write_audit_entry
functions.description_hint: Write audit entry for every state-changing action.

functions.name: notify_reviewers
functions.description_hint: Notify assigned PMs that spec is ready for review.

functions.name: return_spec_location
functions.description_hint: Return spec URL + commit hash to Founder.

functions.name: enumerate_review_queue
functions.description_hint: Enumerate draft specs for authenticated PM.

functions.name: render_review_queue
functions.description_hint: Return review queue within REVIEW_QUEUE_LOAD_BUDGET_MS.

functions.name: verify_review_permission
functions.description_hint: Verify PM holds review permission on spec org (CC.R03).

functions.name: load_spec_bundle
functions.description_hint: Load spec bundle at committed hash.

functions.name: render_spec_view
functions.description_hint: Render spec in reviewable view within SPEC_RENDER_BUDGET_MS.

functions.name: persist_review_comment
functions.description_hint: Persist review comment with identity + section anchor.

functions.name: validate_revision_comment
functions.description_hint: Validate request_revisions includes ≥1 comment.

functions.name: transition_spec_state
functions.description_hint: Transition spec state within STATE_TRANSITION_BUDGET_MS.

functions.name: notify_founder_of_review
functions.description_hint: Notify Founder of review decision + comments.

functions.name: gate_cli_emission_on_approval
functions.description_hint: Enable CLI pipeline on approve; block on reject/revisions.

functions.name: notify_engineers_of_approval
functions.description_hint: Notify subscribed engineers on transition to approved.

functions.name: verify_spec_approved
functions.description_hint: Verify spec is approved before CLI emission.

functions.name: verify_emit_permission
functions.description_hint: Verify Engineer holds emit permission (CC.R03).

functions.name: generate_skill_md
functions.description_hint: Generate SKILL.md from spec's agent + capability sections.

functions.name: generate_claude_md
functions.description_hint: Generate CLAUDE.md from spec's conventions + architecture.

functions.name: generate_mcp_tool_definition
functions.description_hint: Generate one MCP tool def per interface in spec's interface matrix.

functions.name: package_cli_bundle
functions.description_hint: Package SKILL + CLAUDE + MCP into single CLI bundle.

functions.name: sign_cli_bundle
functions.description_hint: Sign bundle with commit hash + emission timestamp.

functions.name: enforce_cli_emission_timeout
functions.description_hint: Complete within CLI_EMISSION_TIMEOUT_SEC.

functions.name: write_bundle_to_vcs
functions.description_hint: Write signed bundle to spec VCS repo.

functions.name: deliver_bundle_to_client
functions.description_hint: Deliver bundle to Engineer's IDE/CLI client.

functions.name: require_receipt_token
functions.description_hint: Require IDE/CLI receipt token before marking delivered.

functions.name: return_bundle_location
functions.description_hint: Return bundle location + signature + commit hash.

functions.name: persist_metric_sample
functions.description_hint: Persist metric samples with source + monotonic ingest timestamp.

functions.name: enforce_customer_overhead_budget
functions.description_hint: Bound ingestion overhead to MAX_CUSTOMER_SYSTEM_OVERHEAD_PCT.

functions.name: aggregate_metric_window
functions.description_hint: Aggregate samples over AGGREGATION_WINDOW_MIN on RECOMMENDATION_CADENCE_MIN.

functions.name: compare_aggregate_to_target
functions.description_hint: Compare aggregates against declared performance targets.

functions.name: compute_metric_deviation
functions.description_hint: Compute deviation for aggregates outside declared target.

functions.name: suppress_noise_deviations
functions.description_hint: Suppress deviations below DEVIATION_SUPPRESSION_THRESHOLD.

functions.name: propose_candidate_improvements
functions.description_hint: Query LLM to propose candidate improvements per deviation.

functions.name: link_recommendation_to_metric
functions.description_hint: Link every candidate to deviating metric + source samples.

functions.name: rank_recommendations
functions.description_hint: Rank by severity + LLM confidence within RECOMMENDATION_LATENCY_SEC.

functions.name: cap_recommendation_list
functions.description_hint: Cap list at MAX_RECOMMENDATIONS_PER_CYCLE.

functions.name: deliver_recommendation_list
functions.description_hint: Deliver ranked list to Engineer stream.

functions.name: notify_pm_of_cycle
functions.description_hint: Notify PMs subscribed to project of cycle completion.

functions.name: persist_recommendation_action
functions.description_hint: Persist Engineer action per recommendation.

functions.name: surface_feature_candidate
functions.description_hint: Surface feature candidate on missing-functionality deviation (<<extends>> UC07).

functions.name: enforce_read_only_posture
functions.description_hint: Refrain from any writeback to customer system in v1 scope.

functions.name: receive_draft_recommendation
functions.description_hint: Receive draft rec with technology + claimed capability.

functions.name: parse_recommendation
functions.description_hint: Parse to extract tech id + capability.

functions.name: classify_capability_metric
functions.description_hint: Classify capability into one metric class.

functions.name: query_documentation_sources
functions.description_hint: Query Documentation Sources for published perf data.

functions.name: query_cloud_providers
functions.description_hint: Query Cloud Providers for availability + pricing baselines.

functions.name: resolve_metric_value
functions.description_hint: Resolve recommendation to concrete metric value using cited sources only.

functions.name: validate_external_citation
functions.description_hint: Validate claimed capability is supported by cited source.

functions.name: compute_traceback_confidence
functions.description_hint: Compute confidence score [0.0, 1.0] per resolution.

functions.name: record_traceback_triple
functions.description_hint: Record traceback triple with cited_at.

functions.name: flag_low_confidence_recommendation
functions.description_hint: Flag for human review when confidence < TRACEBACK_MIN_CONFIDENCE.

functions.name: attach_traceback_to_spec
functions.description_hint: Attach triple when confidence ≥ threshold.

functions.name: enforce_traceback_coverage
functions.description_hint: Refuse spec emission below TRACEBACK_COVERAGE_PCT.

functions.name: return_traced_recommendation
functions.description_hint: Return traced rec within TRACEBACK_LATENCY_SEC to caller.

functions.name: validate_endpoint_urls
functions.description_hint: Validate endpoints are well-formed + reachable from egress.

functions.name: initiate_idp_handshake
functions.description_hint: Initiate OAuth/OIDC handshake with customer IdP.

functions.name: reject_write_scope_grant
functions.description_hint: Reject authorization if any write-capability grant present.

functions.name: persist_encrypted_credential
functions.description_hint: Persist credential encrypted with expiry at ENCRYPTED_CREDENTIAL_EXPIRY_DAYS.

functions.name: establish_vcs_handle
functions.description_hint: Establish read-only VCS handle.

functions.name: establish_observability_handle
functions.description_hint: Establish read-only observability handle.

functions.name: probe_connection_health
functions.description_hint: Probe health across all three handles; fail-closed on any failure.

functions.name: measure_customer_overhead
functions.description_hint: Measure overhead over BASELINE_PROBE_WINDOW_SEC.

functions.name: reject_on_overhead_violation
functions.description_hint: Reject connection when overhead exceeds MAX_CUSTOMER_SYSTEM_OVERHEAD_PCT.

functions.name: persist_connection_record
functions.description_hint: Persist connection record with non-invasive flag + overhead + handles.

functions.name: schedule_reauthorization
functions.description_hint: Schedule reauthorization at CONNECTION_REAUTH_DAYS.

functions.name: enforce_connection_budget
functions.description_hint: Complete establishment within CONNECTION_ESTABLISHMENT_BUDGET_SEC.

functions.name: return_connection_confirmation
functions.description_hint: Return id + overhead + status + reauth date to Engineer.

functions.name: enforce_rbac
functions.description_hint: Enforce RBAC on every protected action (CC.R03).

functions.name: encrypt_secrets_at_rest
functions.description_hint: Encrypt every persisted credential/secret at rest using ENCRYPTION_CLASS.

functions.name: retain_audit_trail
functions.description_hint: Retain audit entries at least AUDIT_RETENTION_DAYS.

functions.name: enforce_rate_limit
functions.description_hint: Bound per-actor request rate to RATE_LIMIT_RPM.

functions.name: fallback_llm_provider
functions.description_hint: Fall back to next provider in fallback ordering on timeout.

functions.name: emit_structured_error
functions.description_hint: Emit structured error with id + retry + support ref.

functions.name: emit_observability_signals
functions.description_hint: Emit structured logs + traces at LOG_LEVEL_PROD, TRACE_SAMPLING_RATE.

functions.name: export_compliance_evidence
functions.description_hint: Export evidence pack in EVIDENCE_EXPORT_FORMATS on request.

cross_cutting_concerns.name: authenticate_session
cross_cutting_concerns.description: Authenticate every human actor's session via configured IdP.

cross_cutting_concerns.name: write_audit_entry
cross_cutting_concerns.description: Record audit entry for every state-changing action.

cross_cutting_concerns.name: enforce_rbac
cross_cutting_concerns.description: Enforce RBAC on every protected action.

cross_cutting_concerns.name: encrypt_secrets_at_rest
cross_cutting_concerns.description: Encrypt credentials and secrets at rest using ENCRYPTION_CLASS.

cross_cutting_concerns.name: enforce_rate_limit
cross_cutting_concerns.description: Bound requests to RATE_LIMIT_RPM per actor.

cross_cutting_concerns.name: fallback_llm_provider
cross_cutting_concerns.description: Fall back to next LLM Provider on timeout.

cross_cutting_concerns.name: emit_structured_error
cross_cutting_concerns.description: Emit structured error with id + retry + support ref.

cross_cutting_concerns.name: emit_observability_signals
cross_cutting_concerns.description: Emit structured logs and traces at declared level/rate.

module_1_constraints_carried_forward: Must run alongside existing customer production systems without disruption (non-invasive)
Must produce auditable specs — every artifact traceable to source (idea, code, metric)
Must trace every tech-stack recommendation to a declared performance metric (availability, throughput, latency)
Must operate across multiple LLM providers; no single-vendor lock-in
Must integrate with version control, CI/CD, IDE/CLI clients, and observability tools without custom connectors per customer
